title: V3 Telephony Gather Conversation Loop
summary: Added telephony conversation mode switch with gather default
Added Twilio POST /twilio/gather turn-based speech conversation route
Updated POST /twilio/voice to support gather conversation mode
Added call-end phrase handling with session closure and TwiML hangup
Added tests for gather conversation loop and preserved stream-mode test
Wired TELEPHONY_CONVERSATION_MODE env in runtime bootstrap
Updated plan/task board/README and added ADR-0011
rollback_steps: Remove /twilio/gather route and gather prompt helper
open_items: Implement V3-004 realtime audio bridge for Twilio media streams
Implement V3-003 Mission Control phone dial controls and call panel
